assertionResults.title: Settings exposes "Publish Backup to Relay" action

steps.action: Open /dashboard/:profileId settings sidebar and inspect Export & Backup section
steps.expected: Publish Backup to Relay action row is visible
steps.observed: Action row and Publish button were visible in Settings > Export & Backup

steps.expected: Password-prompt modal appears with password/confirm, strength bar, Cancel/Publish controls
steps.observed: Publish Backup modal appeared with password input, confirm input, strength meter, Cancel, and Publish

assertionResults.title: Publish requires password, dispatches through WASM helpers

steps.action: Fill Backup Password + Confirm Password with StrongPass123
steps.observed: Publish button became enabled after matching passwords

steps.expected: Backup is published and success UI references reached relay URL
steps.observed: Success state showed "Backup published to 1 relay." and reached list "ws://127.0.0.1:8194"

steps.action: Inspect relay observer feed for authored kind-10000 event
steps.observed: Observer websocket received EVENT for author with ids fcd11c5f... and bac328fd...

evidence.network: NIP-01 observer REQ on ws://127.0.0.1:8194 with filter {kinds:[10000],authors:[derived-share-pubkey]} received matching EVENTs (latest id bac328fd9bf456dd9583795380a29812e160da592970bd41d624fb044e943bd7)

assertionResults.title: Published event is kind 10000 with encrypted content payload

steps.action: Capture latest published relay EVENT payload from observer
steps.expected: Event kind matches profile_backup_event_kind() and payload is ciphertext
steps.observed: Latest event kind=10000, content length=1796, non-JSON ciphertext-like body

steps.action: Run substring checks against sensitive/plaintext markers
steps.expected: Ciphertext does not include groupName, relay URL, or share secret
steps.observed: All plaintext substring checks returned false; JSON parse check returned false

evidence.network: Observed EVENT id bac328fd9bf456dd9583795380a29812e160da592970bd41d624fb044e943bd7 on ws://127.0.0.1:8194 with kind=10000 and encrypted content

assertionResults.title: Success UI confirms publish; modal advances to completion state

steps.expected: Modal advances to completion state with success copy
steps.observed: Completion state displayed "Backup published to 1 relay." with Done action
"Last published: <relative> — reached 1/1 relays" row remained visible after reopen

evidence.network: Publish success backed by relay observer events on ws://127.0.0.1:8194

frictions.description: Seeded runtime kept showing repeated ping-timeout notices for offline peers, adding noisy dismiss buttons in dashboard while validating backup modal flows.
frictions.resolution: Continued validation in Settings sidebar/modal where backup actions are unaffected; no functional impact on backup assertions.
